data.description:
## What
Implement the approved "support both" SESSION_ID disposition (decided on 83f2, dull-strife-sigma): event provenance reads `REBAR_SESSION_ID` (explicit, rebar-owned) with precedence, falling back to the ambient `SESSION_ID`, then short git HEAD, then "unknown". Additive + backward-compatible — users who set only ambient `SESSION_ID` see no behavior change; `REBAR_SESSION_ID` gives an explicit, non-colliding override matching rebar's `REBAR_<KEY>`-prefix + alias-window convention (from the 60ce env-var audit).

## Files
- `src/rebar/_commands/transition.py` (~line 510): the session-provenance read — prefer `REBAR_SESSION_ID`, then `SESSION_ID`, then short git HEAD, then "unknown".
- docs: document the `REBAR_SESSION_ID` / `SESSION_ID` precedence in the env-var/config surface.
- tests: cover the precedence chain.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Provenance reads `REBAR_SESSION_ID` with precedence over ambient `SESSION_ID` (chain: `REBAR_SESSION_ID` -> `SESSION_ID` -> short git HEAD -> "unknown")
- [ ] Backward-compatible: setting only ambient `SESSION_ID` behaves exactly as before
- [ ] Docs updated to document the precedence + alias-window convention
- [ ] Tests cover the full precedence chain
data.title: Add REBAR_SESSION_ID alias (support both) — provenance precedence over ambient SESSION_ID
